For Medical Providers
Maternal Child Adolescent Health (MCAH)
The MCAH program works to improve the health and wellbeing of women, children, and families in Calaveras County. We provide support, resources, and services to help families thrive, from pregnancy through childhood and adolescence.
Home Visiting Program
Our Home Visiting Program offers support right in your home. Our trained staff offer a variety of services such as:
Group connections and social opportunities
Developmental screenings
Parent education and guidance
Parent-child activities
Resource referrals
If you are interested in participating in the Calaveras County Public Health Home Visiting Program, please fill out the
registration form
.
Our program uses the Parents as Teachers model, supports parents in understanding their child's growth and development while promoting positive parenting behaviors. The program activities help families improve their health and financial well-being, prepare children for school success, and strengthen connections within the community.
Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) Program
WIC helps income-eligible families access healthy food and nutrition education. You may qualify if you are:
A pregnant woman
A woman breastfeeding a baby under 1 year of age
A woman who had a baby or was pregnant in the past 6 months
A parent or guardian caring for a baby up to their first birthday
A parent or guardian caring for a child up to their fifth birthday
You may also qualify if you receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKs (TANF), or CalFresh (SNAP) benefits. Working families and migrant families are
welcome to apply
.
Welcome Baby Kits
We provide Welcome Baby Kits to help new parents get started with their newborn.
Childhood Immunization
Keeping your child up-to-date on vaccinations is one of the best ways to protect their health. View the recommended immunization schedules:
Recommended Immunizations for Birth Through 6 Years Old
Recommended Immunizations for Children 7–18 Years Old
Contact us to learn more about any of our services or to schedule an appointment.
